name: shravan-dev-workflow
description: Shravan's development workflow plugin with goal orchestration, research swarms, spec creation swarms, spec handoff, plan creation swarms, repo improvement planning, mental-model reconvergence, docs maintenance, adversarial spec review swarms, operations security review routing, observability proof loops, subordinate agent management, implementation review orchestration, PR wrap-up, plan workflows, debugging, skill authoring, skill audits, progressive TUI presentation guidance, and operations Linear tracking.

interface.shortDescription: Shravan's workflow with spec creation, review, security routing, observability, PR wrap-up, debugging, TUI, and PM
interface.longDescription: Use Shravan Dev Workflow to create specs with bounded spec-creation swarms, gather source-grounded evidence with research-swarm, package spec/design context with spec-handoff, create written implementation plans with plan-creation-swarm, turn clear long-horizon work into verifiable Codex or Claude /goal contracts, reconverge unstable shared mental models with discuss-clarify-mental-models, maintain docs and workflow artifact lifecycle, review drafted specs with bounded review lanes, route explicit security audits to the official Codex Security workflows through ops-security-review, guide local OpenTelemetry and Victoria observability proof loops through ops-observability-stack, and manage subordinate AI agents, sidekicks, ACPX sessions, JSON automation, flows, and custom ACP adapter boundaries with manage-agents. It also runs evidence-backed implementation reviews with bounded reviewer lanes, Codex subagents as the default and majority backend, plus optional Claude or Gemini/agy lanes when requested, validates and addresses accepted review findings, wraps up PRs with checks/comments/review-thread/merge gates through implementation-pr-wrapup, packages copy-pasteable plan and implementation handoffs, runs plan-review-swarm for implementation-plan review, executes written plans with implementation-execute-plan controller-owned verification, writes lane artifacts for clear spec/plan/debug/research work unless chat-only/no-files was requested, requires subagent packets to carry source anchors, security context, candidate-evidence labels, and completion receipts, investigates bugs before fixes, authors and evaluates named skills with creating-skills, audits skill portfolios from real session evidence, and includes progressive TUI presentation guidance that separates visual structure from semantic markdown, plus operations Linear tracking.
defaultPrompt: Run implementation-review-swarm on this change.
Prepare a plan handoff.
Prepare an implementation handoff.
Run plan-review-swarm on this plan.
Use spec-creation-swarm to create this spec before planning.
Use discuss-clarify-mental-models to rebuild the shared map before artifact work.
Use research-swarm to gather source-grounded evidence into a tmp ledger.
Use manage-agents to spawn, resume, monitor, or reduce subordinate agent work.
Use orchestrator-goal to turn this into a verifiable long-horizon goal.
Use docs-maintain to reconcile these docs with current code and plans.
Use spec-review-swarm to attack this spec before implementation.
Use spec-handoff to package this design for another agent.
Use plan-creation-swarm to turn this spec into an implementation plan.
Use plan-improve-repo to audit this repo and write executable improvement plans.
Use ops-security-review to choose the right Codex Security scan.
Use ops-observability-stack to prove local logs, metrics, and traces through the shared stack.
Run implementation-execute-plan on this plan.
Use implementation-pr-wrapup to finish this PR.
Investigate this bug before fixing it.
Use creating-skills to create, update, or evaluate one named skill.
Audit these skills against session evidence.
